   "reasoning": "I'm sick of empty promises, I need concrete help now. Scholarships are the only thing that'll keep me in school, so that's where the money should go. Funding boosts might help, but only if it means smaller class sizes and more resources, not just lining admins' pockets. Attendance mandates are a joke, they don't care that I'm working to survive.",
